summary: A high-level summary and outline of a talk given by Jeff Dean at the Stanford AI Club. The source outlines his rapid-fire overview of AI's 15-year evolution, covering topics from the early days of the Google Brain project and TPUs to modern advancements like attention mechanisms, sparse models, and Google's Gemini. Because the source is only a brief outline without transcripts or detailed arguments, no specific quotes, frameworks, or principles can be safely extracted.
